what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset in the design-source channel, holding metadata and labeling the image as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, zero width/height, source design_source_material, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links array.
Body text declares 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-01.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image/jpeg entry.
The blob field points to a specific blob URI (blob://b2:4a88709cdc696b0e226c8e5cfa49d06c).
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Follows the image ledger naming pattern image__<channel>_<path>.md.
Uses blob:// URIs for content addressing and ISO 8601 timestamps.
concerns: w and h are 0, which may indicate missing or uncomputed image dimensions.
links is empty, which may be intentional or may mean relationships have not been captured.
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source image asset with zero dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content does company-info/p-01.jpg contain?
Which downstream files or processes consume this ground-truth image?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image, and the file matches that purpose as a metadata ledger entry.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to catalog and anchor a source image asset so it can be referenced, retrieved, and treated as authoritative design input.
contribution: Provides a stable metadata record and blob pointer for an image asset, supporting retrieval, provenance, and channel-based lookup in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for the design-source image company-info/p-01.jpg, containing metadata, a blob pointer, and a ground-truth label but no dimensions or links.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register a source design image asset and its provenance in the company ledger.
